news.title:
Innomotics to acquire Siemens India's low voltage motor biz for ₹2,200 Cr by June, boosting its India presence.
Post-acquisition, Innomotics projects 8% annual India growth, focusing on local manufacturing and procurement integration.
news.summary:
Innomotics to acquire Siemens India's low voltage motor biz for ₹2,200 Cr by June, boosting its India presence.
Post-acquisition, Innomotics projects 8% annual India growth, focusing on local manufacturing and procurement integration.

news.title:
HSBC maintains Hold on Siemens India, cuts target price to ₹3,230 citing margin compression risks.
Key risks include slower order inflows and Middle East disruptions into FY27.
news.summary:
HSBC maintains Hold on Siemens India, cuts target price to ₹3,230 citing margin compression risks.
Key risks include slower order inflows and Middle East disruptions into FY27.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal favors L&T, Cummins, Siemens Energy in capital goods; BEL leads in defense.
Sector resilient despite geopolitical tensions; strong order books, growth trends drive optimism.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal favors L&T, Cummins, Siemens Energy in capital goods; BEL leads in defense.
Sector resilient despite geopolitical tensions; strong order books, growth trends drive optimism.

news.title:
Siemens focuses on private capex revival in India, leveraging AI-led automation.
It aims to support local businesses in adopting advanced automation technologies.
news.summary:
Siemens focuses on private capex revival in India, leveraging AI-led automation.
It aims to support local businesses in adopting advanced automation technologies.

news.title:
Siemens raises 2026 outlook, driven by growing AI demand.
Global aid cuts' impact also analyzed in Siemens' strategy.
news.summary:
Siemens raises 2026 outlook, driven by growing AI demand.
Global aid cuts' impact also analyzed in Siemens' strategy.

news.title:
Siemens AG raises outlook on strong demand for factory automation products.
Higher orders from data centers also contribute to Siemens' positive outlook.
news.summary:
Siemens AG raises outlook on strong demand for factory automation products.
Higher orders from data centers also contribute to Siemens' positive outlook.

news.title:
Siemens Ltd released unaudited results for 15 months ending Dec 2025.
Board approved rail subsidiary amalgamation and deferred Rs.186 crore metro capex.
news.summary:
Siemens Ltd released unaudited results for 15 months ending Dec 2025.
Board approved rail subsidiary amalgamation and deferred Rs.186 crore metro capex.

news.title: Siemens delays 1.86B INR investment for metro car assembly indefinitely.
news.summary: Siemens delays 1.86B INR investment for metro car assembly indefinitely.

news.title:
Siemens posted Q3 EBITDA of ₹4.21B, up from ₹4B YoY.
EBITDA margin fell slightly to 11.01% from 11.18% YoY.
news.summary:
Siemens posted Q3 EBITDA of ₹4.21B, up from ₹4B YoY.
EBITDA margin fell slightly to 11.01% from 11.18% YoY.

news.title:
Siemens Ltd received a show cause notice for a refund claim of INR 214.9 Mn.
The claim relates to leasehold rights in Kharghar; company will respond appropriately.
news.summary:
Siemens Ltd received a show cause notice for a refund claim of INR 214.9 Mn.
The claim relates to leasehold rights in Kharghar; company will respond appropriately.

news.title:
Siemens Ltd's Board to meet on 6th Feb 2026 to review unaudited financials for Q5 ending 31st Dec 2025.
The meeting complies with SEBI listing regulations and other applicable obligations.
news.summary:
Siemens Ltd's Board to meet on 6th Feb 2026 to review unaudited financials for Q5 ending 31st Dec 2025.
The meeting complies with SEBI listing regulations and other applicable obligations.

news.title:
Easing China curbs may negatively impact transformer-focused firms like CG Power, while blue chips like L&T and KEC face minimal effects.
Siemens might see limited impact as its orders are driven by smart infra, a free pricing space.
news.summary:
Easing China curbs may negatively impact transformer-focused firms like CG Power, while blue chips like L&T and KEC face minimal effects.
Siemens might see limited impact as its orders are driven by smart infra, a free pricing space.

news.title: YES Research upgrades Siemens India to Neutral with a target price of ₹3,300.
news.summary: YES Research upgrades Siemens India to Neutral with a target price of ₹3,300.

news.title:
L&T, BHEL, ABB India, and Siemens stocks fell as India may ease Chinese bidding curbs, leading to competition in govt contracts.
BHEL dropped 14%, ABB India 6%, Siemens 4.6%, and L&T 4%. Analysts remain positive on capital goods with a strong order backlog.
news.summary:
L&T, BHEL, ABB India, and Siemens stocks fell as India may ease Chinese bidding curbs, leading to competition in govt contracts.
BHEL dropped 14%, ABB India 6%, Siemens 4.6%, and L&T 4%. Analysts remain positive on capital goods with a strong order backlog.

news.title:
Siemens Ltd announces senior management changes effective from Jan 1, 2026, under SEBI Regulation 30.
Dr. Shilpa Kabra Maheshwari and Mr. Rajiv Suri step down; Ms. Sabine Schneider and Ms. Sweta Praharaj are appointed in key roles.
news.summary:
Siemens Ltd announces senior management changes effective from Jan 1, 2026, under SEBI Regulation 30.
Dr. Shilpa Kabra Maheshwari and Mr. Rajiv Suri step down; Ms. Sabine Schneider and Ms. Sweta Praharaj are appointed in key roles.

news.title:
UBS forecasts India's FY26 GDP growth at 7.4%, FY27 at 6.4%, supported by tax cuts, GST relief, and RBI policies.
Portfolio changes include additions of BHEL, Cognizant, Hyundai, and increased weights in L&T, Axis Bank; M&M and Siemens trimmed.
news.summary:
UBS forecasts India's FY26 GDP growth at 7.4%, FY27 at 6.4%, supported by tax cuts, GST relief, and RBI policies.
Portfolio changes include additions of BHEL, Cognizant, Hyundai, and increased weights in L&T, Axis Bank; M&M and Siemens trimmed.

news.title:
ICICI Securities raises Siemens' target price, citing benefits from infrastructure investments.
Siemens' growth likely driven by electrification, smart infrastructure, and mobility contributing 70% and 10% to EBIT.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities raises Siemens' target price, citing benefits from infrastructure investments.

news.title:
HDFC Securities cuts Siemens' target price despite optimistic growth outlook, highlighting capex recovery and trade deal impact.
Siemens India reports Rs 422.5B order backlog, 20.5% YoY growth, driven by digital industries, smart infrastructure, and mobility.
news.summary:
